approaches.title: Modify the Parameter in a Loop
approaches.blurb: Modify the parameter in a while-loop to determine the number of eggs.

approaches.title: Loop Without Modifying the Parameter
approaches.blurb: Loop over the bits without modifying the parameter to calculate the number of eggs.

approaches.title: Convert to a Binary String
approaches.blurb: Convert the parameter to a binary string and count its ones to determine the number of eggs.

approaches.title: Use the Built-In Bit-Count Functionality
approaches.blurb: Use Python's Built-In Bit-Count Functionality to calculate the number of eggs.
